text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... It's friggin' hot...

text_block_list.name: Spirited Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Hraaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Fiery Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Hah! Yah! Hyah! Hiyaaah!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna run one more before I lose momentum.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Yeah, yeah. It's just one more.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: All the runners are charged up for the biggest part of summer camp. Even Taishin is getting really into it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's starting to worry me. I wish there was some way to make her
take a break and ease the tension...

text_block_list.name: Fiery Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
YES! We did all the drills! I'm going to get ready for the festival like
we promised!

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Ah, yeah, the festival. Then let's meet up right before the fireworks
start at seven.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I had no idea, though something tells me Taishin wouldn't enjoy the
crowds.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But still, it feels like a waste to sit it out. Think... Something fun, but
relaxing...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Glug. Ahhh...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Where'd everybody go? Oh right, there's a festival or something
today.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: No one's here. Perfect. Now I can push it to the limit.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Huh? Like what?
choice_data_list: Want to head closer to the forest?
Want to head closer to the forest?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Hmmm... The forest, huh?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I mean, sure, I guess. Nobody's there either.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: On the way over, the sun sets to reveal a star-filled night...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Huff, puff...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Where the heck are we going? We're already pretty far out.
choice_data_list: Here should be fine. Just wait a second.
Here should be fine. Just wait a second.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Wait for what?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The fireworks begin at seven o'clock. Which means they should start
in five, four, three, two...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Whistle... Bang!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Whoa...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: How'd you know that would happen? Hey, did you plan this?
choice_data_list: Me? No way. What a coincidence, huh?
Me? No way. What a coincidence, huh?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I should've known you were up to something.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Boom! Bang!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fireworks light up the sky one after another and fill the night with a
rainbow of colors.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
For a minute, we listen to them crackle with the breeze. Then, Narita
Taishin softly begins to speak.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I can't stand them. Festivals, I mean.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Crowds of people all jammed together. How could anyone want to be
in a place like that? Not that I ever tried.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: You know, your know-it-all attitude really gets on my nerves.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
But the fireworks... They're not bad. And no dumb jerks blocking the
view.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I feel less pressure when nobody's around.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just as she says, she looks completely relaxed now. Being away from
judgmental eyes is important to her...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: But I hope she can make one exception to that.
choice_data_list: I'm here though. Is that okay?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Geez, don't be so weird.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: You're, you know... different.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
You're like one of those fish. Doesn't matter whether you're around or
not.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: But how about you, fishies? I wonder if they notice me... Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Whatever, it doesn't matter. They aren't really watching. They're just
around.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: It's fine... I like it that way—makes it easier for me.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: You can hang around if you want.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
So apparently, I'm on the level of a fish. But from her, that's the best
thing there—

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Hey, quit it. You're staring like an idiot.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Darn right, you dummy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite Taishin's rude words, the light from the bursting fireworks
illuminates her decidedly gentle smile.
